results.title: Kolkata, NE have huge defence manufacturing potential: Ex Army chief Manoj Pande
results.description: Kolkata: Former Army chief Gen Manoj Pande (retd) on Saturday said Kolkata and the northeast have “tremendous potential” to emerge as a defence manufacturing hub. Pande also asserted that conventional warfare and the role of the soldier would remain decisive despite the rapid integration of advanced technologies into modern battlefields.
